description_long: This is a low-top sneaker with a classic silhouette, featuring a predominantly black canvas upper adorned with a striking red flame or abstract pattern along the sides. The shoe has white rubber toe caps and outsoles, with visible white stitching accentuating the construction. White laces are threaded through metal eyelets in a standard criss-cross pattern, and the tongue displays a circular patch with a subtle design. The heel and sidewalls are reinforced, and the overall build suggests comfort and durability for urban environments. The shoe appears clean and well-maintained, with no visible signs of wear.
description: A black low-top sneaker with red flame graphics, white laces, and a white rubber toe cap and sole. The shoe is clean, detailed, and visually striking.
description_view_0: Front view showing the white toe cap, laces, and tongue patch.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the red flame pattern and white stitching.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the black heel with white stitching and a small circular patch on the sole.
description_view_3: Right side view with the red flame graphic and white laces visible.
